since_last: 81% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +5.30%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 81% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.83% · BTC +0.81% · Gold +1.60% · Nasdaq100 +1.77%. 81% of 84 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +5.30%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +5.30%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.53%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ARM is the standout at +11.70%
cards.body: Leaders: ARM +11.70%, MU +8.06%, LRCX +7.65%, HPE +7.60%, SYNA +7.52%. Laggards: AVAV -4.49%, PLTR -3.12%, IBM -2.73%, SOUN -2.72%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +2.67% at $152.26
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +2.67% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
